creator: PostMaster@westbend.net
text:
Thanks to Poul-Henning Kamp for helping to iron out a few minor problems
with the port:

Removal of symbolic link check:

Apache now compiles with -ldescrypt instead of -lcrypt, which allows the
port to compile with out having to create the symbolic links from libcrypt.*
to libdescrypt.*.

The updated port is now available on:

http://www.westbend.net/~hetzels/apache-fp
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/4878.apache-fp.126.e.tgz

Scot
